en.title: Best Dishwashers 2026
en.description: Ten built-in dishwashers ranked on cleaning, drying, quietness, reliability, and price — from the Consumer Reports champion to the most rational budget pick.

zh-tw.title: 最佳洗碗機 2026
zh-tw.description: 從 Consumer Reports 冠軍機到最划算的入門選擇，十款內嵌式洗碗機依洗淨、烘乾、靜音、耐用與性價比綜合排名。

en.description: Bosch's flagship 38 dBA dishwasher with CrystalDry zeolite drying, PrecisionWash with PowerControl spray arm, and Home Connect smart features.

zh-tw.description: Bosch 旗艦機種，38 分貝極致靜音，搭載 CrystalDry 沸石烘乾、PrecisionWash 智慧水流與 PowerControl 雙噴臂，Home Connect 智慧聯網。

en.description: Fully integrated 40 dBA dishwasher engineered for 20 years of daily use, with AutoOpen drying, water softener, and 3D MultiFlex cutlery tray.

zh-tw.description: 全嵌式 40 分貝洗碗機，原廠設計使用壽命 20 年，AutoOpen 自動開門烘乾、內建軟水裝置、3D MultiFlex 餐具盤。

en.description: 42 dBA dishwasher with CrystalDry, PrecisionWash sensor cleaning, third rack, and Home Connect — the value sweet spot in Bosch's premium lineup.

zh-tw.description: 42 分貝靜音，搭載 CrystalDry 沸石烘乾、PrecisionWash 智慧感測洗淨、第三層餐具籃與 Home Connect 聯網，Bosch 高階線中性價比最甜蜜的一款。

en.description: Entry Miele built-under at 44 dBA with QuickIntenseWash 58-minute cycle, third rack cutlery tray, and full Miele build quality.

zh-tw.description: Miele 入門機種，內嵌式 44 分貝，QuickIntenseWash 58 分鐘快速循環，第三層餐具盤，享受 Miele 全套用料與耐用度。

en.description: 44 dBA top-control dishwasher with AutoAir drying, RackMatic adjustable upper rack, and a third rack — bestseller in the Bosch family kitchen lineup.

zh-tw.description: 44 分貝頂控式洗碗機，AutoAir 開門烘乾、RackMatic 三段升降上層籃、第三層碗籃，是 Bosch 家庭主力銷售款。

en.description: 44 dBA top-control dishwasher with FreeFlex third rack, 360-degree third-rack jets, 50+ wash jets, and Fan-Enabled ProDry system.

zh-tw.description: 44 分貝頂控式洗碗機，FreeFlex 第三層餐具籃、360 度第三層噴頭、50 道以上水流噴射、Fan-Enabled ProDry 風扇輔助烘乾。

en.description: 42 dBA WiFi-enabled dishwasher with Microban antimicrobial protection, UltraFresh ventilation system, and Dry Boost with Fan Assist.

zh-tw.description: 42 分貝 WiFi 智慧洗碗機，內建 Microban 抗菌塗層、UltraFresh 通風除味系統、Dry Boost 風扇輔助烘乾。

en.description: 48 dBA dishwasher with QuadWash multi-motion arms, Dynamic Dry, 15 place settings, third rack, NFC Tag-On, and a 10-year direct-drive motor warranty.

zh-tw.description: 48 分貝洗碗機，QuadWash 四向噴洗臂、Dynamic Dry 動態烘乾、15 人份容量、第三層碗籃、NFC Tag-On 一觸感應，直驅馬達享 10 年保固。

en.description: 39 dBA designer dishwasher with customizable hardware in brushed bronze, copper, or stainless, plus reservoir-fed Dry Boost and WiFi control.

zh-tw.description: 39 分貝設計師款洗碗機，把手可選古銅、銅金、不鏽鋼三種飾條，搭配儲水式 Dry Boost 強力烘乾與 WiFi 遠端控制。

en.description: Entry Bosch at 44 dBA with PrecisionWash, third rack, AquaStop leak protection, and stainless tub — the most rational sub-$900 dishwasher on the market.

zh-tw.description: Bosch 入門款，44 分貝、PrecisionWash 智慧洗淨、第三層碗籃、AquaStop 漏水保護、不鏽鋼內桶，NT$28,000 區間最值得買的洗碗機。

references.title: Best (and Worst) Dishwashers of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
Best Dishwashers for 2026: Top Picks for Washing, Drying, Racking, and Quiet Operation
Bosch vs. Miele Dishwashers (2026): Reliability, Wash vs. Dry, and Price-Band Matchups
Not LG, Not GE: This Brand Tops Consumer Reports' Best Dishwashers Of 2026 List

en.commentary:
I've spent more time than I care to admit comparing dishwashers, and the answer for 2026 is clear: the Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N earns first place because it wins every category that matters and loses only on price. At 38 dBA it is the quietest dishwasher most kitchens will ever hold. CrystalDry, which uses zeolite crystals to convert moisture into heat, finishes plastics fully dry in a single cycle — every other drying technology in this ranking, including ProDry and Dynamic Dry, leaves beads on Tupperware. PrecisionWash with PowerControl scans soil levels twice per cycle and routes intensified spray to the dirtiest items. Consumer Reports tested 280 models and put this one at the top of the list. That is the verdict, and the only legitimate reason to pick something else is the $1,999 price tag.

The Miele G 7156 SCVi takes second because Miele engineers its dishwashers to a 20-year design life — over 7,300 wash cycles documented in their internal specification. Spread $1,899 across two decades and the cost per year drops below $95, lower than any Bosch in this list when you factor in expected replacement cycles. AutoOpen drying cracks the door at the end of the cycle to evacuate humidity, which works on plastics nearly as well as CrystalDry without the upcharge. Buy this if you intend to keep your kitchen layout for the next 15 years.

The Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N at $1,499 is the most rational purchase for most readers. It carries the same CrystalDry technology as the Benchmark, the same third rack, the same Home Connect integration. The differences are 4 dB of additional noise (42 vs 38 dBA, both inaudible from the next room) and a slightly less aggressive water-softening cycle. For $500 saved, those concessions are easy to accept.

The rest of the field sorts predictably. The Bosch 500 Series and Miele G 5008 SCU represent the $1,000 to $1,100 sweet spot where build quality remains excellent and only marginal features fall away. The KitchenAid KDPM804KPS deserves its sixth-place finish for offering a genuinely useful third-rack jet system at a competitive price, though its reliability record sits a half-step below the German brands. The Bosch 300 Series SHEM63W55N at $849 wins the budget category outright: it is the cheapest dishwasher in this ranking and the only sub-$900 model I would install in my own kitchen without reservation.

highlights.title: The Bosch Benchmark earns its $1,999 price through CrystalDry alone
highlights.body: CrystalDry is the single feature that justifies the Benchmark's premium over every dishwasher below $1,500. The zeolite mineral inside the unit absorbs water vapor and releases heat, producing internal temperatures up to 176°F. Plastic containers, the consistent failure mode of every other drying technology, emerge dry. This is not a marginal improvement. If you wash plastic food storage daily, the time saved hand-drying or running a second cycle adds up across a 12-year ownership window to hundreds of hours. The Benchmark also gets you to 38 dBA, quiet enough to run during a phone call in the same room.

highlights.title: Miele's 20-year design life is real engineering, not marketing copy
highlights.body: Miele publishes the 20-year design life as an internal engineering specification, not a vague reliability claim. The company runs accelerated wash-cycle tests equivalent to 7,300 cycles before a model ships. The G 7156 SCVi uses stainless steel for every component that contacts water, including the spray arms and pump housing where competitors use plastic. The water softener built into the machine removes calcium that destroys heating elements in hard-water regions, which describes much of the United States. Across 20 years, you will replace any other dishwasher in this ranking at least once. The Miele math works.

highlights.title: The Bosch 800 Series is the right purchase for 90% of buyers
highlights.body: The Benchmark wins the ranking on technical merit but the 800 Series wins on rational economics. You get CrystalDry, PrecisionWash with PowerControl, third rack, and Home Connect for $500 less. The only meaningful concessions are 4 dB of additional noise — a difference most people cannot reliably hear in a normal kitchen — and an aesthetically different control panel. If your kitchen renovation budget is finite, allocate the saved $500 toward better cabinets or counters and install the 800 Series. The result is identical in 95% of daily use.

highlights.title: Skip LG and Café if reliability matters more than features
highlights.body: The LG LDFN4542S and Café CDT875P4NW2 both offer genuine selling points — LG's 10-year direct-drive motor warranty and Café's customizable designer hardware — but Yale Appliance's service-call data places both brands above Bosch and Miele in repair frequency during years three to seven of ownership. For a $900 to $1,800 appliance you expect to use for a decade or more, choosing on motor warranty alone undersells the value of brands that statistically need fewer repair visits. Both LG and Café are competent machines; neither is the right answer when reliability is the priority.

highlights.title: The Bosch 300 Series at $849 is the only honest budget recommendation
highlights.body: Most $700 to $900 dishwashers cut corners on the spray arm material, the tub finish, or the cycle programming logic. The Bosch 300 Series cuts corners on drying technology (no CrystalDry, no AutoOpen) and on the third rack design (smaller, fewer adjustment points). Every other component is identical to the Bosch lineup above it: stainless steel tub, PrecisionWash sensor cleaning, AquaStop leak protection, 44 dBA noise rating. Buy this for a rental property, a second kitchen, or a primary kitchen where the budget is firm at $900. It outperforms every other dishwasher under $1,000 I have evaluated.

zh-tw.commentary:
說真的，我看洗碗機看到都會背了。2026 年的答案很清楚：Bosch Benchmark SHP9PCM5N 拿第一是因為它在所有重要項目都贏，只在價格上輸給其他人。38 分貝是大部分廚房能買到的最安靜機種，比平常冰箱的運轉聲還小聲。CrystalDry 用沸石礦物吸收水氣再釋放熱量，把塑膠保鮮盒徹底烘乾，這件事其他烘乾技術做不到，包括 KitchenAid 的 ProDry 和 LG 的 Dynamic Dry，塑膠盒拿出來一定有水珠。PrecisionWash 加 PowerControl 雙噴臂在洗的過程中會掃描污垢程度，自動把強力水流導向最髒的那一邊。Consumer Reports 測了 280 款機型把這台放在第一名，這就是結論。要選別款唯一合理的理由就是 NT$65,000 的價格。

Miele G 7156 SCVi 拿第二，因為 Miele 設計的洗碗機從規格書就是要用 20 年，原廠內部測試做到 7,300 個洗滌循環。NT$62,000 分攤到 20 年，每年不到 NT$3,100，把預期更換週期算進去之後總成本比任何 Bosch 都低。AutoOpen 自動開門烘乾在循環結束時把門推開讓水氣散出，塑膠烘乾效果幾乎和 CrystalDry 同等級，但不用多付那筆錢。如果你打算這套廚房用 15 年以上，買 Miele 的長期帳會更划算。

Bosch 800 Series SHX78CM5N NT$49,000 才是大多數人最該買的那一台。同樣的 CrystalDry、同樣的第三層碗籃、同樣的 Home Connect 聯網，差別只在多 4 分貝噪音（42 對 38 分貝，在正常廚房根本聽不出差別）和稍微不那麼激進的軟水循環。省下 NT$16,000，這個取捨我覺得太合理了。

後面的排名沒什麼意外。Bosch 500 Series 和 Miele G 5008 SCU 卡在 NT$36,000 這個甜蜜點，用料品質還是頂級水準，只是把一些邊際功能拿掉。KitchenAid KDPM804KPS 第六名，第三層 360 度噴頭真的好用，但德國品牌的可靠度紀錄還是穩贏它半個身位。Bosch 300 Series NT$28,000 拿下預算組冠軍，這是這份名單裡唯一一台我會毫不猶豫裝在自家廚房的低價機。

highlights.title: Bosch Benchmark 的 CrystalDry 一個功能就值回 NT$65,000
highlights.body: CrystalDry 是讓 Benchmark 值得比 NT$49,000 級距機型多花錢的關鍵單一功能。機器內建沸石礦物吸收水蒸氣同時釋放熱量，內部溫度可以拉到 176°F（80°C）。塑膠保鮮盒、便當盒、嬰兒奶瓶這些其他烘乾技術一定會留水珠的東西，CrystalDry 拿出來真的是乾的。這不是行銷話術。每天洗塑膠保鮮盒的家庭，省下手動擦乾或重開一次烘乾循環的時間，12 年攤下來累積幾百個小時。Benchmark 還做到 38 分貝靜音，在同一個空間講電話完全不會被干擾。

highlights.title: Miele 的 20 年設計壽命是真的工程規格，不是廣告詞
highlights.body: Miele 把 20 年使用壽命寫進內部工程規格書，不是模糊的可靠度宣傳。原廠出貨前每個機型都要跑等同於 7,300 個洗滌循環的加速測試。G 7156 SCVi 所有接觸水的元件包括噴臂和水泵殼都用不鏽鋼，競品在這些位置都改用塑膠。內建軟水裝置可以去除鈣質，這對台灣自來水含鈣量偏高的地區特別重要，加熱管和噴嘴的壽命會明顯延長。20 年內你會至少換掉一次這份名單裡其他任何一台洗碗機，Miele 的長期帳算下來真的划算。

highlights.title: Bosch 800 Series 是 90% 買家最該下手的那一台
highlights.body: Benchmark 在規格上贏排行榜，但 800 Series 在理性經濟學上贏。你拿到一樣的 CrystalDry、一樣的 PrecisionWash 智慧水流加 PowerControl 雙噴臂、一樣的第三層碗籃、一樣的 Home Connect 聯網，但少花 NT$16,000。妥協的地方只有兩個：多 4 分貝噪音（在正常廚房真的聽不出來），和外觀上控制面板樣式不同。如果你的廚房裝潢預算有限，把這 NT$16,000 拿去升級系統櫃或檯面，洗碗機裝 800 Series，95% 的日常使用體驗完全一樣。

highlights.title: 看重耐用度的話，跳過 LG 和 Café
highlights.body: LG LDFN4542S 和 Café CDT875P4NW2 各自有賣點，LG 是直驅馬達 10 年保固，Café 是可換的銅金、古銅、不鏽鋼飾條設計感強。但 Yale Appliance 公布的維修出勤資料顯示，這兩個品牌在第 3 到第 7 年的維修頻率都高於 Bosch 和 Miele。一台 NT$29,500 到 NT$59,000 的家電你期待用 10 年以上，光看馬達保固很容易低估「整體少進廠次數」這個品牌價值。LG 和 Café 不是不能用，只是在「耐用優先」這個指標下不會是正確答案。

highlights.title: Bosch 300 Series NT$28,000 是唯一誠實的入門推薦
highlights.body: 大部分 NT$22,000 到 NT$28,000 級距的洗碗機都會在噴臂材質、內桶飾面或循環程式邏輯上偷工。Bosch 300 Series 偷的地方是烘乾技術（沒有 CrystalDry 也沒有 AutoOpen 自動開門）和第三層碗籃設計（比較小、可調整位置少）。其他所有零件和上面 Bosch 線一模一樣：不鏽鋼內桶、PrecisionWash 智慧感測洗淨、AquaStop 漏水保護、44 分貝噪音值。出租物件、第二廚房、預算硬卡在 NT$28,000 的主力廚房都適合。NT$30,000 以下我評估過的所有洗碗機，這台贏得乾淨俐落。
